questions.question: Insert the following records into the employee table: EMPNO = 1, ENAME = 'John Doe', JOB = 'Manager', SAL = 5000, COMMISSION = 2000
options: A) EMPNO = 1, ENAME = 'John Doe', JOB = 'Salesman', SAL = 5000, COMMISSION = 2000
B) EMPNO = 1, ENAME = 'John Doe', JOB = 'Manager', SAL = 5000, COMMISSION = 2000
C) EMPNO = 1, ENAME = 'John Doe', JOB = 'Engineer', SAL = 5000, COMMISSION = 2000
D) EMPNO = 1, ENAME = 'John Doe', JOB = 'Manager', SAL = 6000, COMMISSION = 2000
questions.explanation: The correct option is B) EMPNO = 1, ENAME = 'John Doe', JOB = 'Manager', SAL = 5000, COMMISSION = 2000
